items.name: gstack
items.hook: Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup — 23 opinionated tools wired up as CEO/Designer/EM/QA personas. Hit ~78k stars from a March 11 creation, the breakout viral template of the month.

items.name: claude-code-best/claude-code
items.hook: Runnable, TS-typed, bun-installable build of Claude Code that emerged hours after the March 31 source leak. ~16.4k stars in <3 weeks.

items.name: OpenAI codex-plugin-cc
items.hook: OpenAI ships an official Claude Code plugin — call Codex from inside CC for review or delegation. Cross-vendor moment of the month, 15.2k stars in ~3 weeks.

items.name: ai-website-cloner-template
items.hook: Clone any website with a single Claude Code command — template hit 12k stars in <3 weeks on the back of a viral demo thread.

items.name: Understand-Anything
items.hook: Skill that turns any codebase or knowledge base into an interactive knowledge graph from inside Claude Code. ~8.6k stars by mid-April.

items.name: slavingia/skills
items.hook: Sahil Lavingia's 'Minimalist Entrepreneur' skill pack — opinionated solo-founder workflows. 8k+ stars, broadly forked as a personal-skills starter.

items.name: paoloanzn/free-code
items.hook: Post-leak 'free build of Claude Code' with telemetry and guardrails stripped — controversial but pulled ~8k stars within days.

items.name: NanmiCoder/cc-haha
items.hook: Cross-platform desktop Claude Code fork that bolts on Computer Use. Spawned in the post-leak rush, 7.2k stars in <3 weeks.

items.name: ARIS — Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep
items.hook: Markdown-only autonomous ML research skill — overnight idea/experiment/eval loops. Kicked off the March 'autoresearch' wave, 7k+ stars.

items.name: agency-agents-zh
items.hook: 211 plug-and-play AI expert personas across 18 departments — the Chinese-localized agency pack everyone forked in March.

items.name: claude-code-sourcemap
items.hook: Annotated sourcemap of the leaked Claude Code internals — 8.95k stars, 14.5k forks in <3 weeks. Anchor of the post-leak research cluster.

items.name: web-access
items.hook: Three-tier web/CDP/parallel skill that gives Claude Code robust internet access without third-party MCPs. 5.3k+ stars.

items.name: claude-token-efficient
items.hook: A single drop-in CLAUDE.md that slashes verbosity on heavy workflows. 4.5k stars in three weeks rode the late-March pricing-pain wave.

items.name: codebase-to-course
items.hook: Skill that converts any codebase into a self-paced interactive HTML course — ~3.9k stars from a single tweet.

items.name: autoresearch
items.hook: Karpathy-style autonomous goal-directed iteration skill — second hit in the March autoresearch surge with ~3.9k stars.

items.name: Waza
items.hook: Engineering habits packaged as runnable Claude skills — code review, debugging, refactor playbooks. 3.6k stars.

items.name: claude-code-book
items.hook: 420k-word Chinese book reverse-engineering Claude Code as an Agent Harness — landed at the post-leak peak with 2.8k stars.

items.name: harness
items.hook: Meta-plugin that designs domain-specific agent teams and generates their skills on the fly. 2.7k stars in two weeks.

items.name: cc-gateway
items.hook: Privacy-preserving reverse-proxy gateway for Claude Code — fingerprint normalization, request rewriting, prompt-leak audit. 2.7k stars.

items.name: HolyClaude
items.hook: Dockerized AI coding workstation: Claude Code + 7 sibling CLIs + headless browser + 50+ tools, ready to spin up. 2k stars.

items.name: mcp-brasil
items.hook: MCP server bundling 41 Brazilian public-data and government APIs (CNPJ, CEP, Receita, BCB) into one install. 1.4k stars.

items.name: Claude Plugins Community
items.hook: Read-only mirror of Anthropic's official curated community plugin marketplace. Submission pipeline at clau.de/plugin-directory-submission.

items.name: awesome-claude-code-toolkit
items.hook: Most comprehensive toolkit of the month — 135 agents, 35 skills, 176+ plugins, 14 MCP configs. Heavy March commit cadence.

items.name: lean-ctx
items.hook: Rust binary positioning itself as a 99%-cost-cut MCP + shell-hook layer for 24+ coding agents. 695 stars in three weeks.

items.name: naksha-studio
items.hook: Virtual design team plugin — 26 roles, 60 commands, 13.8k lines of curated design knowledge for Claude Code.
